title: viola × radians
intro: Viola × radians, also known as the hybrid viola or garden pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola x hybrida. This plant is a type of flowering herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola × radians include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues due to its calming and soothing effects. The herbal preparations of Viola × radians can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health issues.
